user.title: Garmin Sync – Connect Account
user.description:
Enter your Garmin Connect credentials and select the sensors to sync.

If your account has two-factor authentication enabled, you will be prompted for a code on the next screen.

mfa.title: Garmin Two-Factor Authentication
mfa.description:
Garmin sent a verification code to **{email}**.

Enter the code below to complete setup.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Garmin
reauth_confirm.description:
Your Garmin session for **{email}** has expired.

Enter your password to reconnect. If two-factor authentication is required, you will be prompted for a code on the next screen.

error.entity_not_found: The selected sensor entity was not found.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Garmin Connect. Check your e-mail/password and try again.
error.invalid_mfa_code: The verification code was incorrect or timed out. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Garmin account is already configured.
abort.reauth_successful: Re-authentication successful. Garmin Sync is reconnected.
abort.unknown: An unexpected error occurred during re-authentication.

init.title: Garmin Sync – Options
init.description: Update the sensors to sync. To change your Garmin password, remove and re-add the integration.

error.entity_not_found: The selected sensor entity was not found.

sync_now.name: Sync to Garmin now
sync_now.description: Immediately pushes the current hydration and weight sensor values to Garmin Connect.

entry_id.name: Config entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional – target a specific Garmin account when multiple are configured.
